items.title: Mens Funny Jesus T Shirts Religious Tees with Funny Sayings Easter Tees for Guys
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: mens, jesus, shirts, religious, tees, sayings, easter, guys. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
